subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down; verily, it is the Path of God unto all who dwell in the heavens and on earth. Blessed is he who turneth towards it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن و انه لصراط الله لمن فی السموات و الارض طوبی لمن توجه الیه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @nearness and remoteness, @chastisement and requital, @power of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
